title: SpecGuru: Hierarchical LLM-Driven API Points-to Specification Generation with Self-Validation
data:
S Kan, YK Li, X Cheng, Y Sui - 2026
Static analysis is a fundamental technique for ensuring software safety and reliability. 
However, when analyzing client code that invokes third-party APIs, proper handling 
of API source code becomes critical. A common approach is to utilize API 
specifications that approximate the essential behaviors of the API while avoiding 
direct analysis of the implementation. Existing methods for constructing API 
specifications often fail to adequately address challenges presented by complex
